candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Balance sheet cash-like line and it matches the cash flow ending cash values exactly across periods, making it the best proxy for cash and cash equivalents.
Represents ending cash on the cash flow statement and matches Bank deposits, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.
Cash balance but beginning-of-period, not the balance sheet end cash.

candidates.row_label: Net Change in Cash including Foreign Exchange Effects
candidates.why: Change in cash, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Chose a balance-sheet label outside the shortlist. 'Bank deposits' is semantically the cash balance and ties exactly to 'Net Cash - Ending Balance' in the cash flow.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities, not LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Direct match to current portion of debt and explicitly excludes leases, which fits STD baseline definition.
Could represent financing debt, but not explicitly identified as current total debt and appears duplicated; less clean than the dedicated current portion debt line.
Not debt principal; should not be included in STD.
Current lease liabilities are explicitly excluded from baseline STD.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current lease maturities but leases are excluded from baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Used the explicit current debt line that excludes leases. Did not include lease maturities or lease liabilities.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet label for taxes payable/current tax liability. The current section contains this line, so it fits TXP.
Tax receivable/claim is an asset, opposite of taxes payable.
Prepaid tax asset, not taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chose the current-balance-sheet 'Tax liability' line as taxes payable/current tax liability.

candidates.why: Direct reported PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE label.
Gross component only, less preferred than total PPE.
ROU assets are lease-related and separate from baseline PPE preference.
Capex flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE net balance.

variables.notes: Selected the direct PPE balance-sheet line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the explicit operating cash flow total.
